scripts.lint: pnpm lint:src && pnpm lint:scripts && pnpm lint:test
scripts.lint:scripts: oxlint -D correctness -D suspicious -D perf -A no-unused-vars -A no-shadow -A no-map-spread scripts/*.ts scripts/*.mts
scripts.lint:test: oxlint --tsconfig tsconfig.node.json --type-aware --type-check -A no-unused-vars -A no-shadow -A no-map-spread -A no-unnecessary-boolean-literal-compare -A no-unsafe-type-assertion -A no-unnecessary-type-assertion scripts/test.ts scripts/test-deduce.mts
scripts.bench:profile: vite build --config scripts/vite-bench.config.ts && node --prof dist-scripts/bench.js && node --prof-process isolate-*.log && rm isolate-*.log
